title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE CONCEPTION-CAPAS ROAD IN THE MUNICIPALITIES OF CONCEPTION AND CAPAS, PROVINCE     OF TARLAC INTO A NATIONAL ROAD

chunks.text:
H. NO. 3932

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 9349, August 04, 2006 ]

AN ACT CONVERTING THE CONCEPTION-CAPAS ROAD IN THE MUNICIPALITIES OF CONCEPTION AND CAPAS, PROVINCE OF TARLAC INTO A NATIONAL ROAD

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The Concepcion - Capas Road in the municipalities of Conception and Capas, Province of Tarlac, consisting of 7.5 kilometers, more or less, is hereby converted into a national road.

SEC. 2. The Secretary of the Department of Public Works and Highways shall issue the necessary rules, orders and circular to implement the provision of this Act.

SEC. 3. The Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.) FRANKLIN M. DRILON

(Sgd.) JOSE DE VENECIA JR.

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on May 29, 2006 and April 3, 2006, respectively.

(Sgd.) OSCAR G. YABES

(Sgd.) ROBERTO P. NAZARENO

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved: AUG. 04, 2006

(Sgd.) GLORIA MACAPAGAL-ARROYO

President of the Philippines
